item.title: Kitchen & Dining Guide: Best Picks & How to Buy Online UK

item.title: Best Kitchen & Dining Finds: Top Deals £7–£140 Now

item.title: Best Kitchen & Dining Deal: BREYLEE Acne Mask Cloth
item.description: BREYLEE Japanese Ultra Fine Fibre Acne Mask Cloth under kitchen & dining — 7 sheets to boost serum absorption and reduce breakouts. Buy now with free P&P.

item.title: Kitchen & Dining: Best Lurpak Douglas Toast Rack Deals
item.description: Find the Lurpak Limited Edition Douglas toast rack in our kitchen & dining guide — boxed, very good condition and affordably priced; buy online now. Shop.

item.title: Kitchen & Dining Deals: Best Boxed & Rare 1970s Cutlery

item.title: Kitchen & Dining: Best Rare 1970's Dema Gold Glass
item.description: Discover this rare 1970s Dema gold gilt flying pheasant beer glass for kitchen & dining collectors — buy online in the UK at £12.99. Limited — shop now.

item.title: Kitchen & Dining: Best Finds Under £69 — Buy Guide!
item.description: Find boxed, rare and cheap kitchen & dining bargains on eBay UK — a guide to buy kitchen & dining items (1970s Dema included) under £69. Shop now — save.

item.title: Best Kitchen & Dining Deals: UFCW Color Cutlery Set
item.description: Read our UFCW Color Cutlery stainless steel flatware review for Kitchen & Dining - where to buy, care tips and cheap deals in the UK. Buy online today.

item.title: Kitchen & Dining Guide: Best Deals on New vs Used UK
item.description: Compare new vs used kitchen & dining finds under £70 on eBay UK, from boxed 1970s rarities to cheap everyday picks - read our guide to buy smart today.
